text:
Once upon a time in the quaint town of Pine Hollow, there lived a little girl named Daisy. Daisy loved exploring the dense woods that surrounded her house, always eager to discover something new. One sunny afternoon, she found an old oak tree with gnarled branches and a ring of white flecks on its trunk.

Curiosity getting the better of her, Daisy reached up and gently pulled off a patch of bark, expecting to find a tiny treasure. Instead, what she found was strange. Inside the hollow circle of bark was a small, pulsating object that glowed faintly with an inner light. Intrigued, she pressed the object against her finger. It was cool and smooth, like ice but warmer.

"Hello," it said. Startled, she let the object drop onto the grass with a soft thud.

"G-Go away," she stammered, unsure what to make of this bizarre thing.
